texto: I'm just a kid who's 4Each day I grow some moreI like exploringI'm CaillouSo many things to do Each day is something newI'll share them with you I'm CaillouMy life is turningChanging each day!With mommy and daddy I'mFinding my wayGrowing up is not so toughExcept when I've had enoughBut there's lots of fun stuff I'm Caillou Caillou Caillou I'm CaillouThat's me!
autor: Caillou (1994-2016) R.I.P he lived a long life and was 4 for 12 years.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Caillou (1994-2016) R.I.P he lived a long life and was 4 for 12 years.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “I'm just a kid who's 4Each day I grow some moreI like exploringI'm CaillouSo many things to do E…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, caillou, christian pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e christian.
